title: NeoOrigins Russian Translate
body:
Русский перевод для мода NeoOrigins для версий NeoForge 1.21.1 в формате набора ресурсов, мод NeoOrigins скачать можно по ссылке: https://modrinth.com/mod/neo-origins

The Russian translation for the NeoOrigins mod for versions NeoForge 1.21.1 in the resource kit format, the NeoOrigins mod can be downloaded here: https://modrinth.com/mod/neo-origins

Thank You Cyberday! I liked your reinvention Origins mod
